errors.STOCK_NO_RECORD_IN_WAREHOUSE: Cannot reserve stock: this resource has no stock record in the order's warehouse. Requested: {{requested}}. Resource id: {{resourceId}}, warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.STOCK_INSUFFICIENT_RESERVE: Cannot reserve stock. Requested: {{requested}}, available in this warehouse (physical stock minus existing reservations): {{available}}. Resource id: {{resourceId}}, warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.STOCK_DUPLICATE: Stock already exists for resource id {{resourceId}} in warehouse id {{warehouseId}}. Use adjust instead.
errors.STOCK_INSUFFICIENT_ADJUST: Insufficient stock. Available: {{available}}, requested reduction: {{requested}}. Stock id: {{stockId}}
errors.STOCK_DELETE_HAS_MOVEMENTS: Cannot delete stock with movement history: the audit trail is append-only. Adjust the quantity to zero instead. Stock id: {{stockId}}
errors.WAREHOUSE_DELETE_HAS_STOCK: Cannot delete warehouse with existing stock. Warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.WAREHOUSE_DELETE_HAS_ORDERS: Cannot delete warehouse with existing orders. Warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.WAREHOUSE_DELETE_HAS_SHIPMENTS: Cannot delete warehouse with existing shipments. Warehouse id: {{warehouseId}}
errors.RESOURCE_DELETE_HAS_STOCK: Cannot delete resource with existing stock. Resource id: {{resourceId}}
errors.RESOURCE_DELETE_REFERENCED: Cannot delete resource referenced by order items. Resource id: {{resourceId}}
errors.UNIT_DELETE_HAS_ORDERS: Cannot delete unit with existing orders. Unit id: {{unitId}}
errors.VEHICLE_DELETE_HAS_SHIPMENTS: Cannot delete vehicle with existing shipments. Vehicle id: {{vehicleId}}
errors.ORDER_DELETE_COMPLETED: Cannot delete a COMPLETED order: its stock movements are part of the audit trail. Order id: {{orderId}}
errors.ORDER_DELETE_HAS_DELIVERED_SHIPMENT: Cannot delete an order with a DELIVERED shipment: its stock movements are part of the audit trail. Order id: {{orderId}}
errors.ORDER_DELETE_HAS_SHIPMENTS: Cannot delete an order with existing shipments. Delete its shipments first. Order id: {{orderId}}
errors.USER_LAST_ADMIN_REMOVE: You can't remove the last enabled ADMIN user.
errors.USER_LAST_ADMIN_DISABLE: You can't disable the last enabled ADMIN user.
